title: Hello World
description: Render a simple 'Hello React Native' text on the screen.
problemStatement:
Welcome to mobile! Create a component `App` that returns a `<Text>` component from `react-native` displaying the message `"Hello React Native!"`.

**Requirement:** Correctly import `Text` from the `react-native` package.
hints: React Native uses mobile components like `Text` and `View` instead of `h1` or `div`.
expectedOutput: A mobile screen showing the text 'Hello React Native!'
